summary: ## Summary: Launch Readiness Audit — hx-avatar ### Changes Implemented - No changes required. The component was already in a launch-ready state with all audit findings resolved. ### Files Modified - None ### Verification Gates - `npm run verify`: 11/11 tasks successful, 0 errors, 0 failures (FULL TURBO cache hit) - `git diff --stat`: clean working tree, no uncommitted changes ### Audit Results 1. **A11y (WCAG 2.1 AA)**: All violations from AUDIT.md resolved — `aria-hidden="true"` on inner ``, `label` property for human-readable name, `console.warn` when `src` set without `alt`, 5 axe-core tests covering all render modes 2. **Astro doc page**: All 13 sections present (`## Overview`, `## Live Demo`, `## Installation`, `## Basic Usage`, `## Properties`, `## Events`, `## CSS Custom Properties`, `## CSS Parts`, `## Slots`, `## Accessibility`, `## Drupal Integration`, `## Standalone HTML Example`, `## API Reference`) 3. **Individual export**: `HelixAvatar` exported from library barrel via `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` 4. **`npm run verify`**: Passes — lint, format:check, type-check all clean ### Risks/Blockers Encountered - None ### Learnings - The `hx-avatar` component had an existing `AUDIT.md` tracking P0/P1/P2 findings, all of which were resolved in the current implementation before this audit run - `Drupal.behaviors` JS block is intentionally omitted since `hx-avatar` dispatches no events — this is consistent with other static components ### Verification Status - Playwright verification not run since no code changes were made; `npm run verify` passing with 0 errors is the definitive gate for this audit-only feature - All 12 documentation template sections confirmed present via `grep "^## "` on the mdx file
